channel.title: Luma Labs
channel.description: Luma Labs — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Introducing Luma Skills: Build a Creative Workflow Once, Run It Forever
item.description: A Skill is a repeatable workflow inside Luma Agents: a clear set of instructions that anyone can follow to reach a consistent, high-quality creative result. It works a little like a good recipe, where a clear list of steps lets almost anyone arrive at something great.
